notes: Application opening in September 2025, deadline in February-March 2027, intake in September 2027. The program is full-time, 3 years, leading to MSc in Pediatric Dentistry. Admission requirements include recognition of dental degree, English proficiency (C2), clinical experience, references, and language skills in Greek. The application process involves submitting documents and paying a fee of 100 Euros. Some tuition costs are specified for 2025-26: 21,000 Euros for EU citizens, 42,000 Euros for non-EU. The program is accredited by the European Academy of Paediatric Dentistry.
